channel.title: Frontion Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇬🇧 British voters cast ballots in elections expected to deal blow to Starmer
item.description: Elections for almost 5,000 council seats in England and to the parliaments in Scotland and Wales could signal the beginning of the end of Britain traditional two-party system if voters opt for populist and nationalist parties.

item.title: 🇱🇻🇳🇦 Baltic nations seek more NATO air defences after drones hit Latvian oil facility
item.description: Latvia and Lithuania called on NATO to boost air defences after two suspected Ukrainian drones crossed from Russian territory and crashed in Latvia, one exploding at an oil storage facility.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇸🇪 Ukraine Gripen fighter jet deal could be signed within months
item.description: Ukraine purchase of Swedish-made Gripen fighter jets could be finalized within months, the Ukrainian defense minister said during talks in Stockholm.

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸 US imposes sanctions on Cuban military conglomerate and mining joint venture
item.description: The Trump administration targeted sources of foreign investment for Cuba communist leaders by sanctioning a business conglomerate run by Cubas military and a Cuban-Canadian mining joint venture.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Xi Positions for Stability as Iran War Casts Shadow Over Trump Summit
item.description: As Xi Jinping prepares to host Trump, Beijing faces the challenge of managing China-Iran economic ties while seeking to preserve the US-China relationship. The Iran conflict threatens to dominate the Beijing summit agenda.

item.title: 🌾 Iran War Threatens Global Food Security, UN Warns
item.description: The Hormuz blockade is cutting off vital agricultural inputs, with the UN FAO warning of harvest risks. China identified as key to maintaining food supply chains amid the crisis.

item.title: 🎯 CIA Assessment: Iran Retains 70% of Pre-War Missile Stockpile, Can Withstand Blockade for Months
item.description: Intelligence report contradicts public statements from Trump officials, suggesting Iran has significant military capacity remaining and can endure the Strait of Hormuz blockade.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Trump Gives EU Until July 4 to Ratify Trade Deal or Face Higher Tariffs
item.description: President Trump set a two-month deadline for the European Union to implement the trade deal agreed last year, threatening significantly higher tariffs if not fulfilled by Independence Day.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Warns Embassies to Flee Kyiv Before Victory Day as Diplomats Refuse to Move
item.description: Moscow issued warnings to foreign embassies ahead of Victory Day celebrations, but diplomats say they have no plans to evacuate. Zelensky said the fate of Russia's parade "depends" on Ukraine's actions.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Kremlin Tightens Putin Security for Victory Day Amid Drone Threats
item.description: Russia is implementing extra security measures for President Putin ahead of May 9 Victory Day celebrations, fearing Ukrainian attacks during the WWII commemorations.

item.title: 🇻🇦 Rubio Meets Pope Leo to Mend US-Vatican Relations Amid Trump Tensions
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio held a private meeting with Pope Leo XIV at the Vatican, discussing religious freedom and humanitarian issues as tensions persist between Trump and the pontiff.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Russia Ramping Up Assassination Attempts Against Opponents in Europe
item.description: European intelligence officials warn that Russia is intensifying efforts to kill dissidents and opponents across Europe, marking a dangerous escalation in Moscow's overseas operations.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Violates Ukraine Ceasefire as Zelenskiy Vows Continued Strikes
item.description: President Zelenskiy says Russia continues to violate a Kyiv-proposed ceasefire, warning that Ukraine will maintain long-range strikes if Russian assaults persist.

item.title: 🛡️ US Sells $17 Billion in Missiles to Gulf Nations as Stockpiles Deplete
item.description: The US and partners have exhausted air defense missiles in the Iran war, and now Washington is selling more missiles worth $17 billion to Gulf allies as production struggles to keep pace.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US and Iran Near Short-Term Peace Deal
item.description: The United States and Iran are edging toward a temporary agreement to halt their war, with Tehran reviewing a proposal that would stop the fighting but leave contentious issues unresolved.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Ukraine Launches Major Drone Attack on Moscow
item.description: Russia reported shooting down 347 Ukrainian drones overnight in a major attack after Moscow shunned a ceasefire offer, marking one of the largest drone assaults on the Russian capital.

item.title: 💰📉 Dollar Faces Trapdoor if Iran War Ends
item.description: Fresh optimism over a possible end to the Iran war has pushed the US dollar back to pre-conflict lows, with analysts warning the greenback could be a casualty of any peace deal.

item.title: 🇯🇵💴 Japan Signals Unlimited Yen Defense
item.description: Japan faces no constraints on currency market interventions and is in daily contact with US authorities, reinforcing Tokyo resolve to defend the embattled yen amid global volatility.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 What At Stake at Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: President Trump is scheduled to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing next week, as both countries seek to stabilize a relationship strained by tensions over trade, Taiwan and the Iran war.

item.title: 🇨🇺 US Sanctions Cuba Nickel Operation Targeting China-Linked Supply Chains
item.description: Marco Rubio announced new sanctions on Thursday, escalating the Trump administration pressure campaign against Havana. The move targets nickel operations with implications for China-linked critical mineral supply chains.

item.title: 🇫🇷 Paris Prosecutor Opens Judicial Investigation Into Elon Musk and X
item.description: Paris public prosecutor has opened a formal judicial investigation into Elon Musk's X social media platform, marking a new step in an ongoing probe.

item.title: 🇺🇳 US Iran Resolution at UN Faces Likely Vetoes from China and Russia
item.description: The US urged countries to support its UN resolution demanding Iran halt attacks and mining of waterways. China and Russia are expected to veto the measure.

item.title: ⛪ UK Press Watchdog Rules Publications Can Call Gaza War a Genocide
item.description: The Independent Press Standards Organisation has ruled that publications are entitled to describe Israel's actions in Gaza as genocide, a significant media ethics decision.

item.title: 🇫🇷 French prosecutors seek charges against Elon Musk and X over abuse images and Grok deepfakes
item.description: Paris prosecutors opened an investigation into X for complicity in distributing child sexual abuse images, deepfakes, and Holocaust denial by the AI system Grok. Musk and former X CEO Yaccarino were summoned for voluntary interviews but did not appear.

item.title: 🏛️ Trump FEMA council proposes sweeping changes to US disaster aid system
item.description: A council appointed by President Trump approved recommendations to overhaul FEMA, potentially reducing federal disaster support and shifting more responsibility to states. The changes would affect how disasters qualify for federal aid and how states receive reimbursement.
